pages.text: With the use of a special curio, certain bosses will have their difficulty enhanced, entering what is known as Torment Mode.
A strange idol found in the deep depths of the world, the uses for it seem endless.
The Torment Nexus unlocks Torment Mode for certain bosses, yet it also increases the experience you gain and the loot you receive.

pages.title: Torment Nexus Crafting
pages.text: The source of hatred burns into others; the zenith of their torment, and yours.
